arts.ttl: Celtic seal play-off spot with dramatic win over Young Boys
arts.sum: Celtic secure a place in the next round of the Champions League for the first time in 12 years after Loris Benito's late own goal earned them a dramatic victory over Young Boys in Glasgow.

arts.ttl: Celtic book place in Champions League knockout rounds as Real Madrid thrash Salzburg
arts.sum: Round-up: Brendan Rodgers’s side and the defending champions are both through to the play-off round at least with one more matchweek of fixtures in the league phase

arts.ttl: 6 Celtic vs Young Boys ref calls as VAR dominates on glory night from penalty snub to Maeda red card
arts.sum: It was a Champions League triumph for the Hoops on a night where the ref took centre stage

arts.ttl: Rennes to sign Celtic striker Kyogo Furuhashi in €12m deal
arts.sum: Rennes are set to sign Celtic FC striker Kyogo Furuhashi (30), according to a report this Wednesday from Le Parisien. The Ligue 1 team have monitored the Japan international for…

arts.ttl: Who can Celtic face in the Champions League knockout play-off? Potential opponents and fixtures dates
arts.sum: Plenty can still change but all that will matter to Hoops fans is having knockout Champions League ties to enjoy

arts.ttl: Tony Docherty hails Dundee history makers for ending 69 year derby hoodoo as boss determined to right Celtic near miss
arts.sum: Docherty's team face Celtic this weekend and he's confident his side can topple the champions

arts.ttl: Celtic secure Champions League play-off with dramatic win against Young Boys
arts.sum: Celtic secured Champions League progression with a Young Boys own goal on a night of disallowed goals, missed penalties and red card drama at Parkhead.

arts.ttl: Celtic create Champions League history on euphoric European night as they storm into playoffs - 5 talking points
arts.sum: It was nervy at times but the Hoops got there in the end

arts.ttl: Hart says Engels did something he's never seen, just before penalty miss for Celtic v Young Boys
arts.sum: Engels had a 100% penalty record heading into this game, but he practically passed the ball to the Young Boys keeper and it was an easy save. Celtic made life difficult for themselves in an action-packed game against Young Boys in the Champions League on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Celtic ensure Champions League play-off spot with win over Young Boys
arts.sum: Kyogo Furuhashi had three first-half goals disallowed and Arne Engels had a penalty saved.
